packageInfoDetail.updateDesc:
【相机】
新增大师模式下支持拍摄实况照片，并可调节风格化参数，让实况照片更有哈苏味儿
优化大师模式黑白/单色滤镜的调节体验，滤镜默认值改为50，升级将重置之前的滤镜强度
优化人像模式下原彩 ProXDR 效果，带来堪比专业相机的光斑效果，画面层次更加立体

【通信】
提升通信系统稳定性与兼容性
提升无线连接稳定性与兼容性

【系统】
优化系统稳定性与流畅性
packageInfoDetail.updateDescEnglish:
【Camera】
You can now take live photos in Master mode and adjust the effects, bringing a touch of Hasselblad to your live photos.
Improves the camera user experience when adjusting the B&W or Mono filter in Master mode. The default filter intensity is now set to 50. Previously set filter intensity values will be reset to the default value after you upgrade the app.
Improves the true color ProXDR effect of the camera in Portrait mode, which brings professional-level lens flare effects and makes the image more layered.

【Communication】
Improves communication stability and compatibility.
Improves the stability and expands the compatibility of wireless connections.

【System】
Improves system stability and performance.

packageInfoDetail.updateDesc:
【相机】
新增支持全球首个原彩 ProXDR 实况功能，预览画面、封面帧、视频帧都有 HDR 效果，高光部分的色彩和细节表现更佳
优化 2X 焦段触发微距模式后的预览画质，提升近物拍摄体验
优化微信视频通话时的美颜效果，帮助你在通话时展示最佳状态
优化人像场景下的人脸影调表现，进一步还原画面中高光和阴影部分的细节
优化实况照片在逆光场景下的人像拍摄效果

【应用】
优化相机预览页及相册触发一键闪记时的流体云展示效果
优化一键闪记识别到日程新建日历时的图标效果

【通信互联】
提升蜂窝通信兼容性和稳定性
提升无线连接稳定性
修复特定路径下无法添加车钥匙问题

【系统】
优化系统稳定性与流畅性
packageInfoDetail.updateDescEnglish:
【Camera】
Adds the world's first true color ProXDR support for live photos. The preview, cover photo frame, and video frames of live photos now all support HDR, allowing for better performance of colors and details in high-contrast scenes.
Improves the preview image quality when triggering Macro mode at 2× focal length, delivering a better user experience in close-up shots.
Optimizes the retouching effects when making video calls in WeChat.
Improves the tone performance on faces when shooting in Portrait mode, bringing out more details in both highlights and shadows.
Improves the image quality of live photos when shooting in backlight scenes using Portrait mode.

【Apps】
Improves the visual effect of Live Alerts when triggering MemoClip on Camera's preview page or in the Photos app.
Improves the icon graphics when adding a new Calendar event that is recognized via MemoClip.

【Communication & interconnection】
Enhances compatibility with cellular networks for a more reliable connection.
Improves the stability of Wi-Fi connections.
Fixes an issue where car keys can't be added in specific paths.

【System】
Improves system stability and performance.

packageInfoDetail.updateDesc:
【相机】
新增搭载全新 OPPO LUMO 凝光影像，通过强大光学设计和先进计算能力的相互驱动，打造出人景皆美的专业移动影像系统，无论日夜，随手拍大片
新增视频模式和慢动作模式支持 4K120fps 杜比规格，为视频创作带来更多可能
新增 25M 超清格式支持拍摄实况和合影，定格美好瞬间，保留更多细节

【应用】
新增小布记忆合集功能，根据合集名称自动归类相关记忆，内容管理更轻松
新增相册 AI 灵感成片，通过 AI 一键构图，自动调整画面比例，还能自动调色，智能推荐滤镜，一键成片
优化输入法键盘面板布局，调整输入法面板字号及间距，手指操作更加精准，整体视觉更加清爽舒适

【通信互联】
新增与 Windows 电脑 O+互联功能，支持跨端文件管理，让办公更便捷
提升蜂窝通信兼容性和稳定性

【系统】
优化系统稳定性与流畅性
packageInfoDetail.updateDescEnglish:
【Camera】
Discover exceptional mobile photography with OPPO's LUMO IMAGE system, tailored for capturing breathtaking portraits and landscapes. This advanced technology combines innovative optical design with cutting-edge computational enhancements to deliver superior image quality, whether it's day or night.
Enjoy the ability to capture stunning videos at 4K resolution and 120 fps in both Video and Slo-mo modes.
Now supports 25 MP hi-res format for live photos and group photos, delivering stunning detail and clarity.

【Apps】
Collections now automatically archive past and future memories related to their names, simplifying memory management for you.
Introduces AI Recompose in the Photos app, which automatically adjusts the composition, aspect ratio, and color palette for optimal results. You can also easily apply suggested filters to enhance your photos.
Adjusts the keyboard layout, font size, and spacing for more accurate typing and a cleaner interface.

【Communication & interconnection】
The O+ Connect app now supports Windows, enabling you to connect your mobile device to a Windows computer for effortless file management across devices.
Enhances compatibility with cellular networks for a more reliable connection.

【System】
Improves system stability and performance.

packageInfoDetail.updateDesc:
【小布助手】
新增可通过语音唤醒小布，让小布帮你点一单历史外卖。例如对小布说：“帮我点个上一单的外卖”（当前仅支持一个月内已点过的美团、美团外卖和饿了么外卖）

【小布建议】
新增小布建议支持显示大麦网购买的演出出票及观演提醒

【小布识屏】
优化小布识屏启动性能，提升识屏速度
优化小布识屏提取图片的效果，支持提取原图
优化小布识屏提取文字后的排版格式
优化小布识屏触发手势，仅支持双指按压触发识屏，且支持自定义开启触发的应用，有效减少误触

【通信互联】
新增 AI 通话翻译功能，通话中可将双方通话进行实时双语互译，支持翻译并播报和仅翻译对方显示译文两个模式，轻松应对跨语言沟通（前往“电话-设置-AI 通话助手”，设置 AI 通话翻译）
新增手机通过 CarLife 投屏至车载屏幕后，手机和车载屏幕上均可调节投屏分辨率
新增手机投屏至车载屏幕的帧率设置，支持调节不同的投屏帧率（车机设置-帧率设置）
新增手机投屏至车载屏幕时，限制屏幕刷新率的开关，让手机恢复高刷新率，使用更流畅（手机设置-智慧车载-更多设置-限制屏幕刷新率开关）
新增手机投屏至车载屏幕时的高斯模糊效果，提升视觉体验
提升蓝牙 LE Audio 连接时间，提升游戏时的音频体验

【相机】
新增照片模式和大师模式支持 224 mm 的焦段（相机-设置-镜头焦段-更多焦段-224 mm），点击 6x 缩放按钮，可在更多焦段之间切换
新增专业视频模式支持音频电平功能，在视频录制过程中可以实时监看音量的波动，减少爆音废片
新增专业视频模式 Log 录制下支持 120fps，为影视创作者提供电影级视频工具箱。OPPO 官方调色 LUT 可进入官网下载（OPPO 官网->服务与支持（底部）->Log 还原 LUTs 下载）
优化视频专业编辑体验，120fps 的视频在编辑保存后仍保持为 120fps

【相册】
新增 AI 最佳表情功能，支持识别并替换同一人物在不同场景下的表情，达到最佳成片效果
支持视频导出为实况与单图、实况导出为超清单图，让素材的每一帧都焕发新生
优化相册首页的自定义能力，支持将指定的图集内容不显示在相册首页照片列表

【应用】
新增更多常用应用支持使用密码本在登录页自动填充
新增在使用密码本填充账号密码时，可选择其他应用的账号密码进行自动填充，提升使用体验
新增通话录音支持按联系人自动分组
新增录音支持自定义分组，便于管理录音文件
新增未成年人模式及桌面图标，开启后可帮助未成年人健康使用手机
新增支持在来电和通话记录界面隐藏联系人号码，降低隐私泄露风险（电话本-设置-更多设置-隐藏联系人号码）
优化录音分组功能，新增普通分组，标准、会议、采访模式下的录音将自动分组到普通分组
优化了通话设置页的结构，功能排布更直观
优化来电拦截规则，对标记号码类型（如骚扰电话、广告推销等）可以分别选择更多拦截阈值，方便设置（电话本-右上角更多图标-骚扰拦截-拦截规则设置-来电拦截规则-拦截标记号码）

【系统】
新增支持多屏触控，一个应用全屏显示，一个应用自由浮窗显示，双应用可同时操作，更高效
新增临时屏蔽横幅通知功能，打游戏、看视频时，频繁收到应用通知，可上滑通知临时屏蔽，减少打扰（设置-通知与控制中心-横幅通知-临时屏蔽）
新增控制中心关机重启快捷开关，点击即可跳转至关机重启界面
优化迷你浮窗移动位置范围，支持拖拽迷你浮窗至屏幕底部，提升使用体验
新增支持将桌面上相同尺寸的卡片拖动到一起，卡片将堆叠展示
packageInfoDetail.updateDescEnglish:
【Breeno】
You can now wake Breeno to order the same takeaway food as the previous order. This feature only supports orders made with Meituan, Meituan Waimai, and Ele.me within a month.

【Breeno Suggestions】
Breeno Suggestions now supports showing reminders from the Damai ticketing platform for ticket issuance and showtimes.

【Breeno Touch】
Improves the launch performance and recognition speed of Breeno Touch.
Breeno Touch now supports the extraction of original images.
Improves the layout format of text extracted by Breeno Touch.
Breeno Touch now only supports activation via a 2-finger press. Additionally, you can customize which apps respond to the activation gestures, helping to minimize accidental triggers.

【Communication & interconnection】
Adds the Translate Call feature, which can translate calls in real time. It supports two modes including Translate & read aloud and Translate only. This feature is available in ""Phone - Settings - AI Call Assistant - Translate Call"".
Adds the ability to adjust screen mirroring resolution on both the phone and car screen when mirroring via CarLife.
Adds frame rate settings for mirroring the phone to the car screen. You can find this feature in ""Settings - Frame rate"" on the car display.
Adds the Limit screen refresh rate switch, enabling higher refresh rates and enhanced performance during car display. You can find this feature in ""Settings - Smart Cars - More settings - Limit screen refresh rate"".
Introduces a Gaussian blur effect during car display.
Improves the connection time of Bluetooth LE Audio to enhance the audio experience during gaming.

【Camera】
Adds support for 224 mm focal length in Camera's Photo mode and Master mode. Tap the 6× zoom button to switch between more focal lengths. You can find this feature in ""Camera - Settings - Lens focal length - More focal lengths - 224 mm"".
Adds the Audio level feature in Camera's Pro Video mode. This feature allows you to monitor volume fluctuations in real time during video recording and reduce blown-out clips.
Adds 120 fps support for recording log videos in Pro Video mode. This feature will serve as a toolbox for film and television creators when shooting cinematic videos. You can now download the official OPPO LUTs for color grading from the official OPPO website in ""Support (page bottom) - Download LUTs for log restoration"".
Improves the video editing performance. A 120 fps video will remain 120 fps after being edited.

【Photos】
Adds the AI Perfect Shot feature, which supports recognizing and replacing the facial expressions of the same person in different scenes to create the best shots.
You can now export videos as live photos, or export videos and live photos as photos in high resolution.
Enhances the customization options on the Photos homepage, allowing you to hide the content of specific albums from the overall photo list.

【Apps】
Adds support for more commonly used apps to automatically fill in passwords on the sign-in page.
Adds the option to select accounts and passwords from other apps for password autofill.
Call recordings now can be automatically grouped by contacts.
Recorder now supports customizable grouping, making it easier to manage audio files.
Adds Minor mode to Settings and the Home screen. This mode enforces restrictions designed to promote healthy digital device usage for minors.
You can now hide contact numbers in the incoming call and call log screens to reduce the risk of privacy leaks. You can find this feature in ""Contacts - Settings - More settings - Hide contact phone numbers"".
Adds the In-person recordings group in Recorder. Recordings made in Standard/Meeting/Interview modes are automatically grouped into the In-person recordings category.
Improves the page layout of Call settings for a more intuitive experience.
Improves call blocking rules by allowing more selective blocking thresholds for flagged numbers (such as spam calls and telemarketing).
